title: 駿足！合体！スプリンターズアタック！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While visiting Director Akikawa's private beach
to enjoy some extracurricular activities and get
some lower-body strength training in...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Gah, the fish are so fast!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... I can't catch any... And I bet they'd taste so good in a seafood hot pot...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Running in the water is even harder than running
on dirt... I guess I'll just have to give up and make
do with the ingredients I already ha—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
For class representatives, there's no such thing as
an impossibility! Whether it's through fire or
water, you just have to Bakushin your way
through!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, she's pursuing those fish with such
ferocity... Ah! She's cornered them in that rocky
area!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Now's our chance, Biko! When I pick up this
boulder, you grab the fish!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You're mine now! Secret technique! Triiiangle
Caaatch!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Buono! ☆ Nice job with the fish, Biko!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And thanks for the assist, Bakushin O! Do you
want to eat some hot pot with us?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
While I appreciate your offer, an exceptional
class representative's work never ends, so I must
take my leave! Fare thee well!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Preparations for a 3,600-meter Bakushin, START!
Legs and feet, IGNITE!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
She looks incredibly buono taking on so many
challenges one after another. I should really take
a leaf out of her book! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Deeply stirred by this experience, Hishi
Akebono's running becomes more and more
powerful from that day on!
